title: geochloa rufa
intro: Geochloa rufa, also known as Redtop or Buffalo Grass, is a species of grass native to North America. Geochloa rufa has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geochloa rufa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues. Geochloa rufa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and utilize its health benefits.
